omega_h2.description: Relic density Ωh². Null when OMEGA_UNCONVERGED or not requested.

xf.description: Freeze-out parameter (m_DM/T_f). Null for solvers (e.g. DRAKE) that don't use it.

cosmology.description: v1 assumes standard thermal cosmology. Non-standard cosmologies require relic/v2.

model_class.description: Producer self-identification (e.g. 'MSSM', 'darkSU3'). Free-form; not validated against a whitelist.
